basics.name: Johnathan Yesid Silva Parra
basics.label: Senior Software Engineer | Mobile Architect
basics.summary: Senior Mobile Developer with over 8 years of experience specializing in cross-platform (Flutter) and native mobile development (Android/iOS). Experienced in designing scalable software architectures (Clean Architecture and Hexagonal Architecture), implementing CI/CD pipelines with AWS, Azure, and Bitrise, and delivering secure, enterprise-grade solutions for the financial, retail, healthcare, and logistics industries. Passionate about software quality, performance optimization, technical leadership, and building high-impact digital products that drive business value.

work.name: Epam Systems
work.summary: Develop enterprise mobile solutions for the financial sector, driving scalable architectures, CI/CD automation, DevSecOps practices, and the integration of Generative AI tools to streamline development workflows. Contribute to software quality through automated testing strategies, performance optimization, and engineering best practices while supporting the team as Backup Technical Lead.
highlights: Served as Backup Technical Lead, supporting architectural decisions, technical mentoring, and team coordination.
Increased automated test coverage from 40% to 93%, significantly improving software quality and reducing regressions.
Integrated Generative AI tools using the Model Context Protocol (MCP), automating development workflows and improving team productivity.
Designed and implemented AWS-based CI/CD pipelines to automate build, testing, and deployment processes.
Contributed to the growth of Itaú Trader from 5 to 67 corporate clients.
Helped the team achieve 85% of its quarterly OKRs through continuous delivery of strategic initiatives.

work.name: Tres Astronautas
work.summary: Contributed to the design and development of a multi-tenant SaaS platform for the FinTech industry, focused on enterprise B2B solutions. Participated in defining the platform architecture, deployment automation, and cloud integrations to deliver a scalable, secure, and multi-organization solution.
highlights: Designed and implemented a multi-tenant SaaS architecture ensuring tenant isolation and scalability.
Optimized Azure DevOps CI/CD pipelines for automated build, testing, and deployment workflows.
Integrated Firebase services, including Authentication, Firestore, and supporting cloud infrastructure.
Developed Cloud Functions for authentication, authorization, and user management, strengthening backend security and business logic.

work.name: Apex Global Mobility
work.summary: Contributed to the evolution of B2B and B2C mobile platforms for CBC by modernizing application architecture, improving performance, and automating delivery pipelines. Supported the redesign of the Loyalty platform, international expansion, and technical leadership as Backup Technical Lead.
highlights: Served as Backup Technical Lead, supporting architecture decisions, technical mentoring, code reviews, and release coordination.
Led the publication of mobile applications on Google Play and the App Store, ensuring successful production releases.
Contributed to the complete redesign of the Loyalty platform, enabling business goals to be achieved months ahead of schedule.
Supported the international expansion of the platform from 5 to 17 countries.
Migrated the solution to a monorepo architecture, improving maintainability, scalability, and code reuse.
Implemented Bitrise CI/CD pipelines for automated mobile builds and deployments.
Received a performance recognition bonus for technical impact and successful delivery of strategic objectives.

work.name: Yalutec
work.summary: Developed frontend features for a web-based Loyalty platform focused on rewards, points redemption, and customer engagement. Built enterprise-grade Flutter Web solutions emphasizing maintainability, responsiveness, and scalability.
highlights: Developed frontend features using Flutter Web.
Implemented responsive user interfaces for rewards, points management, and redemption workflows.
Built reusable UI components to improve consistency and accelerate feature development.
Collaborated with cross-functional Agile teams to deliver new product features.

work.name: Venko
work.summary: Led the development of mobile solutions across healthcare, digital identity, productivity, and enterprise management. Defined software architectures, provided technical consulting, and led the mobile engineering team while delivering Flutter, Kotlin, and OpenCV-based solutions.
highlights: Led end-to-end mobile projects, from requirements gathering and architecture design to production deployment and maintenance.
Scaled the Mobile team from one developer to four engineers through mentoring, code reviews, and technical leadership.
Published and maintained all company mobile applications on Google Play and the App Store.
Led the redesign of Firmese, contributing to its recognition within the Microsoft for Startups program.
Represented Venko in technical consulting sessions with strategic clients, defining architectures and technical solutions.
Delivered projects for organizations including Pensemos and Universidad Pontificia Bolivariana.
Designed enterprise solutions using Flutter, Kotlin, and OpenCV for automation, document recognition, and productivity.
Improved software architecture, maintainability, scalability, and application performance.

work.name: Actions Tracker S.L.
work.summary: Developed IoT solutions for Android focused on monitoring, automation, and remote management of connected devices using BLE and Wi-Fi. Integrated ESP32 hardware, telemetry systems, geolocation, and backend synchronization for real-time asset management.
highlights: Integrated Android applications with ESP32 devices using Bluetooth Low Energy (BLE) and Wi-Fi.
Implemented OTA firmware update processes for IoT devices.
Designed hardware synchronization modules using Room and backend services.
Developed advanced geolocation features including geofencing and maritime monitoring.
Implemented real-time event detection, including accident monitoring and panic alerts.
Contributed to a flexible IoT platform supporting boats, vehicles, motorcycles, trains, and aircraft.
Developed the platform primarily in Java while modernizing selected modules with Kotlin.

work.name: High Developer
work.summary: Started my professional career developing enterprise mobile applications, evolving from native Android (Java/Kotlin) to iOS (Objective-C/Swift), Xamarin, NativeScript, and Flutter. Built a strong foundation in mobile architecture, cloud integrations, and cross-platform development.
highlights: Developed native Android applications using Java and Kotlin.
Contributed to iOS applications using Objective-C and Swift.
Built cross-platform applications with Xamarin, NativeScript, and Flutter.
Delivered solutions for IoT, healthcare, public safety, and enterprise management.
Integrated Firebase services and third-party APIs for authentication, notifications, storage, and synchronization.
Applied software engineering best practices and Agile methodologies throughout the development lifecycle.

work.name: Freelance
work.summary: Designed and developed software solutions for clients across multiple industries, including HealthTech, FoodTech, mobility, logistics, and enterprise management. Managed the entire software development lifecycle, from requirements gathering and solution architecture to deployment and production support, building cross-platform applications with Flutter and integrating cloud services, payment gateways, communication platforms, and AI-powered features.
highlights: Developed SaaS applications and platforms for healthcare, restaurants, delivery, vehicle rental, and transportation industries.
Designed scalable architectures using Flutter, Firebase, Laravel, and cloud-native services.
Integrated third-party services including OpenPay, Stripe, Twilio, and authentication providers.
Implemented AI-driven features and business process automation to improve operational efficiency.
Managed projects end-to-end, including requirements analysis, architecture, development, deployment, and long-term maintenance.

work.name: Personal
work.summary: Develop personal software products to explore emerging technologies, validate business ideas, and experiment with modern software architectures. Created applications spanning education, enterprise management, social networking, finance, and property management while applying software engineering best practices and user-centered design principles.
highlights: Designed and developed cross-platform applications using Flutter across multiple business domains.
Built products focused on education, finance, social networking, property management, and productivity.
Experimented with GraphQL, Firebase, advanced animations, and scalable architectures to accelerate product development.
Focused on delivering high-quality user experiences, performance optimization, and maintainable codebases.
Used personal projects as innovation laboratories to validate technologies, design patterns, and new product ideas before applying them to enterprise solutions.

specializations.description: Building mobile and web applications from a single codebase.

specializations.description: Providing technical leadership through mentoring, architectural decision-making, and team collaboration.

specializations.title: DevSecOps & CI/CD
specializations.description: Automating build, testing, deployment, and security processes across development pipelines.

specializations.title: Cloud Architecture
specializations.description: Designing and integrating cloud-based solutions for enterprise applications.

specializations.title: Generative AI & Automation
specializations.description: Integrating AI models and workflow automation to improve productivity and software development processes.

specializations.title: IoT & Computer Vision
specializations.description: Developing intelligent solutions through connected devices and image processing technologies.
